content.speakerText: We're grabbing drinks after work—join us? Everyone’s going!
content.speakerTextCn: 下班后一起去喝一杯？大家都去！

options.text: That sounds like so much fun! I’ve got a doctor’s appointment, but I’d love to join next time!
Why are you always inviting me? I hate parties.
Sure, I’ll be there in 10 minutes.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了积极的语气+具体理由+未来承诺，符合礼貌拒绝的社交规范。选项1过于敷衍，选项3具有攻击性，选项4与拒绝意图矛盾。

content.speakerText: Come on, it’s just one drink—you always say no!
content.speakerTextCn: 来嘛，就一杯，你每次都拒绝！

options.text: Yeah, I’m just not a social person.
I know I’ve been a party pooper lately—I’m working on it! Let me treat you all next Friday?
Fine, I’ll come, but only if you pay.
I don’t drink, so why ask me?

content.explanation: 正确答案用幽默自嘲+改进承诺化解尴尬，是高情商回应。选项1消极负面，选项3态度傲慢，选项4虽真实但缺乏社交润滑，易引发不适。

content.speakerText: Hey, the team is heading to that new Thai place after work—want to come?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，团队下班后要去新开的泰餐厅，一起来吗？

options.text: I’d love to, but I have a piano lesson tonight. Can I join you next week?
Thai food? No thanks, I hate spicy food.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了积极开头+具体理由+未来邀请，符合场景最佳实践。选项1理由牵强，选项3直接批评食物，选项4是接受而非拒绝，不符合题干要求。
